mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, version, project_id, sprint_id, epic_id, type, seq, title, description, points, assignee_id, status, rank, created_by, created_at, done_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tasks WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND sprint_id IS NULL AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY rank ASC
SELECT FROM tasks WHERE sprint_id = #{sprintId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY rank ASC

SELECT FROM tasks WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND (lower(title) LIKE lower(#{pattern}) ESCAPE '\' OR lower(description) LIKE lower(#{pattern}) ESCAPE '\') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (tenant_id, project_id, sprint_id, epic_id, type, seq, title, description, points, assignee_id, status, rank, created_by, created_at, done_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{t.projectId}, #{t.sprintId}, #{t.epicId}, #{t.type}, #{t.seq}, #{t.title}, #{t.description}, #{t.points}, #{t.assigneeId}, #{t.status}, #{t.rank}, #{t.createdBy}, #{t.createdAt}, #{t.doneAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET version = version + 1, project_id = #{t.projectId}, sprint_id = #{t.sprintId}, epic_id = #{t.epicId}, type = #{t.type}, seq = #{t.seq}, title = #{t.title}, description = #{t.description}, points = #{t.points}, assignee_id = #{t.assigneeId}, status = #{t.status}, rank = #{t.rank}, created_by = #{t.createdBy}, done_at = #{t.doneAt} WHERE id = #{t.id} AND version = #{t.version} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
